content: Self-Refine’s unguided iterative self-feedback framework can be augmented by integrating multiple inconsistent perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to resolve the common blind spot that single-perspective self-feedback fails to catch flaws the original output shares with the refiner’s same default reasoning. This creates a hybrid refinement pipeline that retains Self-Refine’s core advantage of no extra training or labeled data while significantly boosting output quality by addressing self-feedback’s inherent confirmation bias.
